sectionSubtitle: Founded by Engineers. Driven by Innovation.
intro: OBH Software was founded at the University of Galway by Ethan O'Brien and Sarah Jane Hughes — two Electronic & Computer Engineering students passionate about technology and problem-solving.

Named in the Irish Independent 30 Under 30 — Class of 2025, and as Stanford University Innovation Fellows, we bring a fresh, efficiency-driven and sustainable approach to tackling complex business challenges. We empower businesses to streamline operations, enhance productivity and stay ahead in a rapidly evolving digital world.

highlights.text: Industry experience across transport, construction & more
